title: Microhub Influencer Marketing Agency Website - Frontend Implementation

requirements.summary: Create hero section with headline, subtext, CTA buttons, and generated background visual
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays headline and subtext prominently
Two CTA buttons are visible and styled consistently
Background visuals are modern and creator-focused
Section is responsive on mobile devices

file_operations.description: Create Hero component with headline 'Stop Spending Lakhs on Ads. Work With Real Creators.', subtext 'Microhub helps brands grow through micro & nano influencer collaborations that actually convert.', two CTA buttons labeled 'Work With Creators' and 'Join As Creator', and background image using frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png
Import and add Hero component to the main application layout

requirements.summary: Create problem section highlighting brand pain points and positioning Microhub as the solution
acceptanceCriteria: Four pain points are clearly displayed
Transition to Microhub solution is clear and compelling
Section has strong visual hierarchy

file_operations.description: Create ProblemSection component displaying four pain points: expensive ad campaigns, low engagement, fake influencer reach, and poor ROI, followed by positioning Microhub as the solution with strong visual hierarchy
Import and add ProblemSection component below Hero in the main layout

requirements.summary: Create What We Do section explaining four core service offerings
acceptanceCriteria: All four service offerings are displayed clearly
Section uses icons or visual elements to support text
Content is scannable and easy to understand

file_operations.description: Create WhatWeDo component displaying four services: influencer matchmaking, barter & paid campaigns, content-driven brand exposure, and campaign strategy & reporting, with icons and scannable layout
Import and add WhatWeDo component to the main layout after ProblemSection

requirements.summary: Create Why Microhub section emphasizing unique value propositions and differentiation
acceptanceCriteria: Four unique value propositions are clearly displayed
Section differentiates Microhub from competitors
Design emphasizes trust and credibility

file_operations.description: Create WhyMicrohub component displaying four differentiators: focus on micro & nano creators, real engagement over fake followers, Mumbai-focused local targeting, and affordability for small & mid brands, with trust-building design using frontend/public/assets/generated/pattern-accent.dim_800x800.png as background accent
Import and add WhyMicrohub component to the main layout after WhatWeDo

requirements.summary: Create How It Works section with 4-step process flow
acceptanceCriteria: Four steps are displayed in a clear sequential flow
Each step has a visual indicator (number or icon)
Process is easy to follow and understand

file_operations.description: Create HowItWorks component with 4-step process: Step 1 - Brand shares goals, Step 2 - We shortlist creators, Step 3 - Campaign execution, Step 4 - Track performance, with numbered visual indicators and clear sequential flow
Import and add HowItWorks component to the main layout after WhyMicrohub

requirements.summary: Create creator recruitment section targeting secondary audience
acceptanceCriteria: Section addresses creators as secondary audience
Message is compelling and action-oriented
CTA button is prominent and styled consistently

file_operations.description: Create CreatorSection component with message 'Don't chase brands. Let brands discover you.' and a prominent 'Join Microhub' CTA button styled consistently with other CTAs
Import and add CreatorSection component to the main layout after HowItWorks

requirements.summary: Create testimonials section with placeholder cards for brand and creator reviews
acceptanceCriteria: Section includes placeholder testimonial cards
Layout supports multiple testimonials
Design includes space for reviewer name and company/role

file_operations.description: Create Testimonials component with placeholder cards for brand and creator reviews, including reviewer name, company/role, and testimonial text in a responsive grid layout
Import and add Testimonials component to the main layout after CreatorSection

requirements.summary: Create contact section with lead form storing submissions via backend
acceptanceCriteria: Form includes all five required fields
Form has clear labels and validation
Form submission stores lead data
Success/error messages are displayed appropriately

file_operations.description: Create ContactForm component with fields for Name, Brand Name, Budget Range, Contact Number, and Email with validation, calling backend.submitLead() on submission and displaying success/error messages
Import and add ContactForm component to the main layout after Testimonials

requirements.summary: Implement mobile-first responsive design across all components
acceptanceCriteria: All sections adapt gracefully to mobile screens
Touch targets are appropriately sized
Text remains readable on small screens
Navigation works seamlessly on mobile

file_operations.description: Configure Tailwind with mobile-first breakpoints and ensure responsive utilities are available for all components
Add base responsive styles including appropriate touch target sizing (minimum 44x44px) and mobile-optimized typography scaling

requirements.summary: Add Instagram integration and WhatsApp contact button
acceptanceCriteria: Instagram integration is visible and functional
WhatsApp button opens WhatsApp with pre-filled message or contact
Both integrations are mobile-optimized

file_operations.description: Create SocialIntegrations component with Instagram feed or link integration and WhatsApp button that opens WhatsApp chat with pre-filled contact message, both mobile-optimized
Import and add SocialIntegrations component to appropriate location in the layout (floating or in footer)

requirements.summary: Create clean footer with Mumbai location and relevant links
acceptanceCriteria: Footer displays Mumbai as company location
Footer includes contact information
Footer design is clean and minimal
Footer is responsive on all screen sizes

file_operations.description: Create Footer component with Mumbai location information, contact details, and relevant links in clean minimal design, using frontend/public/assets/generated/mumbai-skyline.dim_1200x400.png as decorative element, fully responsive
Import and add Footer component at the bottom of the main layout

requirements.summary: Implement modern scroll animations throughout the website
acceptanceCriteria: Elements animate smoothly as they enter viewport
Animations enhance user experience without being distracting
Animations are performant and don't cause lag
Animations respect user's motion preferences

file_operations.description: Create custom hook using Intersection Observer API for scroll-triggered animations that respects prefers-reduced-motion media query and provides smooth performant transitions
Add scroll animation hook to Hero component for element reveals
Add scroll animation hook to ProblemSection for staggered element reveals
Add scroll animation hook to WhatWeDo for service card animations
Add scroll animation hook to WhyMicrohub for value proposition reveals
Add scroll animation hook to HowItWorks for sequential step reveals
Add scroll animation hook to CreatorSection for message and CTA reveal
Add scroll animation hook to Testimonials for card stagger animations

requirements.summary: Implement SEO optimization targeting 'Influencer Marketing Agency in Mumbai'
acceptanceCriteria: Page title and meta description include target keyword
Headings use semantic HTML and include relevant keywords
Images have appropriate alt text
Page follows SEO best practices for local business

file_operations.description: Update page title to include 'Influencer Marketing Agency in Mumbai', add meta description with target keyword, add Open Graph tags, and include structured data for local business
Ensure headline uses semantic h1 tag with keyword-rich content
Use semantic h2 tags with relevant keywords in section heading
Use semantic h2 and h3 tags with relevant keywords in section and service headings
Use semantic h2 tags with relevant keywords including Mumbai local targeting emphasis
Ensure alt text includes 'diverse creators for influencer marketing campaigns in Mumbai'
Ensure alt text includes 'Mumbai skyline representing local influencer marketing presence'

requirements.summary: Apply premium minimal design aesthetic with specified color scheme and typography
acceptanceCriteria: Color scheme uses black, white, and chosen bold accent color consistently
Typography is bold and impactful
Layout feels spacious and uncluttered
Overall design balances professionalism with youthful energy
Design prioritizes brand owners as primary audience

file_operations.description: Configure custom color palette with black, white, and electric blue or neon green as accent color, define bold typography scale with strong font weights, and set spacing scale for spacious layouts

Define global premium minimal design system including bold typography styles, minimal color usage with strategic accent placement, spacious layout utilities, and professional yet youthful visual tone targeting brand owners
Apply premium minimal styling with bold typography, strategic accent color usage, and spacious layout
Apply premium minimal styling with clean hierarchy and accent color highlights
Apply premium minimal styling with bold service titles and subtle accent color accents
Apply premium minimal styling with strong value proposition emphasis using accent colors
Apply premium minimal styling with numbered steps using accent color and clean typography
Apply premium minimal styling with bold CTA using accent color
Apply premium minimal styling with clean testimonial cards and subtle accent borders
Apply premium minimal styling with clean form inputs and accent color focus states
Apply premium minimal styling with clean layout and subtle accent color usage
